date_notes: Oct 21 2020: leaked adviser documents show proposals to remove residential school references; March 29 2021: official K-6 draft curriculum released; April 2021: majority of school divisions decline to pilot. EVT-055 covers the controversy arc spanning these dates.
title_en: Government releases K-6 curriculum draft drawing criticism for age-inappropriate content and historical inaccuracies
title_fr: Le gouvernement publie un projet de programme d'études de la maternelle à la 6e année critiqué pour son contenu inadapté à l'âge et ses inexactitudes historiques
description_en: The UCP government releases a draft K-6 curriculum drawing criticism from educators, academics, and Indigenous groups for historical inaccuracies, age-inappropriate content, and perceived ideological framing. The Alberta Teachers' Association and school boards call for withdrawal.

update_log.change: Added R-090 (Oct 2020 leaked advisers), R-091 (school divisions reject pilot). Date note clarifies the 2020 leak preceded the 2021 draft release.
Date corrected to March 30 (per CBC byline). R-070 updated to correct Janet French article URL.
